Comment: Unique identifier for each vendor record (UUID primary key)
Full legal or trade name of the vendor/supplier
Classification of the vendor (e.g., raw material, contract manufacturer, 3PL)
Country where the vendor is headquartered or primarily operates
Geographic region of the vendor (e.g., APAC, EMEA, North America)
Vendor tier classification indicating strategic importance (e.g., Tier 1, Tier 2, Tier 3)
Composite reliability score (0?1 or 0?100) based on past delivery performance and quality metrics
Average number of days from purchase order placement to goods receipt for this vendor
Indicates whether the vendor is currently active and eligible for new purchase orders (TRUE/FALSE)
Unique identifier for each manufacturing or distribution plant (UUID primary key)
Full descriptive name of the plant facility
Short alphanumeric code used to reference the plant in systems and reports
Country where the plant is physically located
Geographic region of the plant (e.g., APAC, EMEA, North America)
Maximum number of units the plant can produce or process in a single day under normal conditions
Type or function of the plant (e.g., Assembly, Fabrication, Packaging, Distribution)
Indicates whether the plant is currently operational and accepting production orders (TRUE/FALSE)
Unique identifier for each calendar date record (UUID primary key)
The complete calendar date value (YYYY-MM-DD format)
Calendar year extracted from the full date (e.g., 2024)
Fiscal or calendar quarter number (1?4)
Calendar month number (1?12)
ISO week number of the year (1?53)
Full name of the month (e.g., January, February)
Name of the day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday)
Flag indicating whether the date falls on a Saturday or Sunday (TRUE/FALSE)
Flag indicating whether the date is a recognized public or company holiday (TRUE/FALSE)
Unique identifier for each work shift record (UUID primary key)
Descriptive name of the shift (e.g., Morning Shift, Night Shift, Mid Shift)
Scheduled start timestamp of the shift (date and time)
Scheduled end timestamp of the shift (date and time)
Name or employee ID of the supervisor responsible for overseeing the shift
Unique identifier for each warehouse or storage facility (UUID primary key)
Full descriptive name of the warehouse
Short alphanumeric code used to reference the warehouse in systems and reports
Type of warehouse (e.g., Finished Goods, Raw Materials, Cold Storage, Cross-Dock)
Country where the warehouse is physically located
Geographic region of the warehouse (e.g., APAC, EMEA, North America)
Maximum number of units the warehouse can store at full capacity
Indicates whether the warehouse is currently active and available for inventory operations (TRUE/FALSE)
Unique identifier for each customer record (UUID primary key)
Full name of the customer or business entity
Market segment the customer belongs to (e.g., Enterprise, SMB, Retail, Wholesale)
Country where the customer is located or registered
Geographic region of the customer (e.g., APAC, EMEA, North America)
Sales or distribution channel through which the customer orders (e.g., Direct, E-Commerce, Distributor)
Indicates whether the customer account is currently active (TRUE/FALSE)
Unique identifier for each shipment or delivery destination (UUID primary key)
Full name of the destination location (e.g., store name, customer site, distribution hub)
Type of destination (e.g., Retail Store, Customer DC, 3PL Facility, End Customer)
Country where the destination is located
Geographic region of the destination (e.g., APAC, EMEA, North America)
Latitude coordinate of the destination for geographic/routing analysis
Longitude coordinate of the destination for geographic/routing analysis
Unique identifier for each logistics carrier or freight provider (UUID primary key)
Full legal or trade name of the carrier
Mode or type of carrier (e.g., Air, Ocean, Road, Rail, Courier)
Country where the carrier is headquartered or primarily operates
Historical average number of transit days from pickup to delivery for this carrier
Percentage of shipments delivered on or before the expected delivery date (0?100)
Indicates whether the carrier is currently active and available for scheduling (TRUE/FALSE)
Unique identifier for each product/SKU record (UUID primary key)
Stock Keeping Unit - unique alphanumeric code used to identify and track the product in inventory
Full descriptive name of the product
Product sub-category within a broader category hierarchy (e.g., Electronics > Smartphones)
Brand name under which the product is sold or manufactured
Physical weight of one unit of the product in kilograms, used for freight and handling calculations
Type of packaging used for the product (e.g., Box, Pallet, Crate, Blister Pack)
Indicates whether the product is currently active and available for sale or production (TRUE/FALSE)
Unique identifier for each procurement transaction record (UUID primary key)
Foreign key linking to dim_vendor - identifies the supplier from whom the goods were ordered
Foreign key linking to dim_product - identifies the product that was procured
Foreign key linking to dim_date - identifies the date the purchase order was placed
Foreign key linking to dim_warehouse - identifies the destination warehouse for the received goods
Total number of units requested in the purchase order
Actual number of units received/delivered by the vendor against the purchase order
Percentage difference between quantity ordered and quantity delivered; positive = over-delivered, negative = under-delivered
Purchase price per unit of the product as agreed with the vendor (in reporting currency)
Total procurement cost for the transaction (quantity_delivered ? unit_cost)
Actual number of calendar days elapsed between order placement and delivery
Current status of the procurement order (e.g., Pending, In Transit, Received, Cancelled)
Unique identifier for each manufacturing production run record (UUID primary key)
Foreign key linking to dim_plant - identifies the plant where production took place
Foreign key linking to dim_product - identifies the product that was manufactured
Foreign key linking to dim_date - identifies the date of the production run
Foreign key linking to dim_shift - identifies the work shift during which production occurred
Number of units scheduled for production in this run
Actual number of units successfully produced during the run
Percentage of produced units that failed quality inspection or were deemed defective (0?100)
Rate of units produced per hour or per shift, measuring production efficiency
Percentage of total available machine capacity utilized during the production run (0?100)
Total hours of unplanned or planned machine/equipment downtime recorded during the shift
Unique identifier for each inventory snapshot record (UUID primary key)
Foreign key linking to dim_warehouse - identifies the warehouse where inventory is held
Foreign key linking to dim_product - identifies the product being tracked
Foreign key linking to dim_date - identifies the date of the inventory snapshot
Actual quantity of units physically available in the warehouse on the snapshot date
Minimum stock level threshold below which a replenishment order should be triggered
Buffer stock maintained to protect against demand uncertainty or supply delays
Binary flag indicating that stock on hand has dropped to zero or below the safety stock level (1 = stockout, 0 = no stockout)
Binary flag indicating that stock on hand significantly exceeds demand requirements, tying up working capital (1 = overstock, 0 = normal)
Unique identifier for each shipment record (UUID primary key)
Foreign key linking to dim_carrier - identifies the logistics provider handling the shipment
Foreign key linking to dim_product - identifies the product being shipped
Foreign key linking to dim_date - identifies the date the shipment was dispatched
Foreign key linking to dim_warehouse - identifies the originating warehouse from which the shipment departed
Foreign key linking to dim_destination - identifies the delivery endpoint for the shipment
Total number of units loaded and dispatched in this shipment
Total number of units confirmed as received at the destination
Actual number of days elapsed from shipment dispatch to delivery at destination
Carrier-committed or SLA-based number of transit days promised at time of booking
Difference between actual and expected transit days; positive = late, negative = early delivery
Total freight and logistics cost charged by the carrier for this shipment (in reporting currency)
Current status of the shipment (e.g., In Transit, Delivered, Delayed, Lost, Returned)
Unique identifier for each sales demand record (UUID primary key)
Foreign key linking to dim_product - identifies the product for which demand was recorded
Foreign key linking to dim_customer - identifies the customer who placed the demand or order
Foreign key linking to dim_date - identifies the date the demand or order was placed
Foreign key linking to dim_destination - identifies the delivery address or destination for the order
Total number of units requested by the customer in the order or demand signal
Actual number of units shipped and fulfilled against the customer?s demand
Percentage of demand that was successfully fulfilled (units_fulfilled / units_demanded ? 100)
Total revenue generated from this demand record (units_fulfilled ? selling price per unit, in reporting currency)
